testcase.classname: buildEmailAppOpenHref prioriza WEEKLY_SUMMARY_EMAIL_APP_LINK cuando no hay EMAIL_APP_OPEN_LINK
testcase.name: buildEmailAppOpenHref prioriza WEEKLY_SUMMARY_EMAIL_APP_LINK cuando no hay EMAIL_APP_OPEN_LINK

testcase.classname: buildEmailAppOpenHref con OPEN_APP_ONLY usa esquema anto y path por defecto (triple barra para deep link)
testcase.name: buildEmailAppOpenHref con OPEN_APP_ONLY usa esquema anto y path por defecto (triple barra para deep link)

testcase.classname: buildEmailAppOpenHref con OPEN_APP_ONLY y path explícito
testcase.name: buildEmailAppOpenHref con OPEN_APP_ONLY y path explícito

testcase.classname: buildEmailAppOpenHref con OPEN_APP_ONLY y WEEKLY_SUMMARY_APP_PATH vacío solo abre la app
testcase.name: buildEmailAppOpenHref con OPEN_APP_ONLY y WEEKLY_SUMMARY_APP_PATH vacío solo abre la app

testcase.classname: buildEmailAppOpenHref sin flags usa FRONTEND_URL + path
testcase.name: buildEmailAppOpenHref sin flags usa FRONTEND_URL + path

testcase.classname: buildEmailAppOpenHref buildWeeklySummaryAppHref sigue siendo alias de buildEmailAppOpenHref
testcase.name: buildEmailAppOpenHref buildWeeklySummaryAppHref sigue siendo alias de buildEmailAppOpenHref
